DocumentationExampleCode.Code: @' render-site --workspace ..\SuiteWorkspace --out ..\Site '@ | meta-mesh add-step --operation regenerate-public-docs --name render-site --executable meta-docs --arguments-stdin --working-directory .
cd MetaDocs\Docs\Documentation.MetaMesh meta-mesh validate --operation regenerate-public-docs meta-mesh run --operation regenerate-public-docs
